name: Hazleton School Employees
description_short: Human Services Employees Credit Union (HSECU) is a member-owned financial cooperative serving employees with 60+ years of operation, offering banking, credit cards, and promotional loan products.
description_long:
Human Services Employees Credit Union has operated for over 60 years as a credit union serving a specific employee membership base. Based in Atlanta, Georgia, the organization functions as a traditional credit union with a physical main office location and established infrastructure for member support. The credit union has maintained operational continuity and membership loyalty through six decades of service.

HSECU offers core banking and lending services typical of credit unions, including VISA credit cards with dedicated card member services and lost/stolen card support. The organization actively promotes seasonal financial products, such as their Back to School Loan promotion, suggesting they tailor offerings to member needs throughout the year. Members can access credit card services through dedicated phone lines and make payments via their Atlanta headquarters address.

The credit union's primary distinction is its membership model serving Human Services employees specifically, which creates a defined member base rather than open public enrollment. This targeted membership approach allows HSECU to align services with the needs of a particular employment sector. The organization maintains direct communication channels and personal service support through their main office phone line and email address.

However, the available website content provides limited detail on comprehensive service offerings, interest rates, fee structures, loan terms, or product-specific features. The promotional material focuses on seasonal offerings rather than comprehensive product information. Potential members should contact HSECU directly to understand full eligibility requirements, competitive rates, and complete service details before making decisions.
services: VISA credit cards with rewards and cardholder benefits
Back to School Loan promotion (seasonal product)
Credit card member services and support
pros: 60+ years of operational history and member trust in the credit union sector
Member-owned credit union structure typically offers competitive rates and lower fees than traditional banks
VISA credit card program with dedicated card member services phone line
Seasonal promotional loan products (Back to School Loan) targeting member needs
Multiple contact methods: phone, fax, and email for member support
Physical office location in Atlanta with established infrastructure
cons: Limited to Human Services employee membership—not open to general public
Website provides minimal detail on loan terms, interest rates, fees, or APRs
No information on online banking capabilities, mobile apps, or digital services
Restricted service area appears Atlanta-based with no mention of branches or national access
No mention of deposit insurance coverage (NCUA) or other member protections
best_for: Current and retired Human Services industry employees in the Atlanta area
Employees seeking credit union membership with stable, established institution
Members interested in VISA credit cards with member-focused services
diagnosis: HSECU is best for Human Services employees in the Atlanta area seeking a stable, member-owned credit union with VISA credit card services and occasional promotional lending products. The main caveat is that membership is restricted to a specific employee group, and the website lacks detailed information on rates, terms, and full service offerings—direct contact is necessary to evaluate competitiveness.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Hazleton School Employees — NCUA-insured credit union in HAZLETON, PA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
